Skin Cancer Screening 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/skin-cancer-screening/ 
Skin Cancer Screening 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a skin cancer screening? 
A skin cancer screening checks your skin for signs of skin cancer before you have any symptoms. To do this, you or your health care provider will examine your skin for moles , birthmarks , or other areas that have an unusual color, size, shape, or texture.
